title: docs: make --seccomp=profile.json clearer
body:
There are not only allowed syscalls, also blocked ones or handled differently.

[CI:DOCS]

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Cockpit tests failed for commit 77847bd67a6f0c1c127546625ca43b93704d33e0. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

@giuseppe @Luap99 @vrothberg Something major just broke in rawhide a few hours ago, which completely breaks cockpit, in all projects (not just c-podman). We are investigating. For urgent stuff, please ignore rawhide-cockpit-revdeps run and just look at f39.

OK, that [selinux-policy rawhide update](https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/FEDORA-2024-f83f4948f7) broke cockpit hard, but the [emergency update](https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/FEDORA-2024-a750c178ad) fixed it. Can you please go through the cockpit-revdeps rawhide failures in https://github.com/containers/podman/pulls and retry these? there should be at least 7 of them. I'm not allowed to retry them myself. Thanks, and sorry for the noise!
